title: synaedrys harlandii
side_effects: Synaedrys harlandii can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can lead to respiratory problems, including shortness of breath and lung congestion. Improper use can also cause skin irritation, including redness and itching, as well as gastrointestinal issues like diarrhea and stomach pain. In severe cases, overexposure to Synaedrys harlandii can result in seizures, coma, or even death.
